prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `2b9ef948`.
codex_response:
Implemented `2b9ef948` end to end. The rule is: find the `3x3` `4`-ring with colored center, find the auxiliary object’s colored marker and lone `4`, use their offset vector to translate the ring center, then fill the whole output with the marker color and draw both diagonals plus a `3x3` `4`-ring around the translated center, keeping the center cell in the marker color.

I used `arc2_opus46_summary.json` as the starting hint, but both summaries were too loose about the exact geometry, so I documented the corrected construction in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2b9ef948/notes.md#L1). No new shared primitive was needed. The generator matches the task family by explicitly sampling the original sparse black input layout: one `3x3` ring and one connected `marker/5/4` rectilinear motif, with straight, L-shaped, and three-sided variants, then deriving the output from the same internal offset rule.

Implementation is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2b9ef948/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2b9ef948/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2b9ef948/generator.py#L1), and [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2b9ef948/notes.md#L1). Verification/build results: official examples `5/5` passed, generated examples `1000/1000` passed, and the preview sheet looked on-family. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b9ef948/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b9ef948/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b9ef948/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b9ef948/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2b9ef948/previews/preview_03.png).
